description: Photograph depicting a dry, open landscape, consistent with Mediterranean pseudo-steppes in a dry season. In the foreground, dry, light-coloured grass and soil are visible, with thin, light-coloured horizontal lines (possibly a fence or branches) crossing the lower and mid-parts of the frame. The mid-ground features a wide expanse of green grassland, behind which a horizontal line of trees, some with green foliage and others bare, stretches across the scene. In the background, low hills or mountains are visible under a bright, partly cloudy sky. A prominent, bare-branched tree stands on the right side of the foreground, partially obscuring the view.
